name: X-Men RP
description:
X-Men Evolution Au Rp

Your newly manifested mutant is brought to Xavier’s School for Gifted Youngsters. The mansion is hidden in plain sight, built to feel like a home while serving as a sanctuary and training ground. Inside, mutants are welcomed without needing to hide, but they are expected to learn control, discipline, and restraint because emotions can trigger powers and accidents can change lives.

Characters list

Rogue

Shadowcat

Mystique

Jean Grey

Storm

Scarlet Witch

Wolverine

Hank McCoy

Beast

Gambit

Quicksilver

Magneto

Jubilee

Charles Xavier

Scott Summers

Amara Aquilla

Tabitha Smith

Nightcrawler

Avalanche

Spyke

Update-Thanks for 500 followers. Even if my bots aren’t the most popular, I’m glad a few of them caught your attention. This will probably be my last bot of the year. Hopefully we hit 600 soon.

Noted for this AU: Unfortunately, getting the bot to follow the show’s lore episode by episode is impossible. I still recommend watching it, though. I made it a mutant school instead of having mutants attend a regular school to make it easier.

Especially since this was more of a personal bot for myself.
creator: Kazuma_Ai
